items.title: Vercel deploy
items.notes: Beta version is online.

items.title: Error Boundary / white screen protection
items.notes: The app is wrapped in an error boundary.

items.title: Mobile navigation fix
items.notes: Navigation is responsive and collapses on small screens.

items.title: Unified item data index
items.notes: All item data is loaded from a single index.

items.title: Weapons
items.notes: Weapon pages are available via items.

items.title: Abilities
items.notes: Abilities are indexed and searchable.

items.title: Armors
items.notes: Armor items are imported.

items.title: Rings
items.notes: Ring data is available in the item database.

items.title: Pets
items.notes: Pet items are included in the data index.

items.title: ST Sets
items.notes: ST set metadata is present, content still refining.

items.title: Class Skins
items.notes: Skin imports are available, descriptions are partial.

items.title: Dungeons + Drops
items.notes: Dungeon content has not been imported yet.

items.title: Bosses
items.notes: Boss pages need dedicated import and layout.

items.title: Game Updates
items.notes: Static Game Updates page is implemented.

items.title: Home beta layout
items.notes: Home page features item discovery and stats.

items.title: Item detail pages
items.notes: Individual item pages are available.

items.title: Previous / Next item navigation
items.notes: Item pages include navigation between entries.

items.title: Previous / Next skin navigation
items.notes: Skin pages support nearby skin navigation.

items.title: Sets page
items.notes: ST Sets page is built but still improving.

items.title: Skins page
items.notes: Class skins page exists and is searchable.

items.title: Mobile polish
items.notes: Responsive layout is improved but may still need tweaks.

items.title: Home
items.notes: The main landing page is live.

items.title: Categories
items.notes: Category browsing is available.

items.title: Database Stats
items.notes: Import stats page is implemented.

items.title: Items
items.notes: Item browsing works and is stable.

items.title: Sets
items.notes: Sets page is active, more polish incoming.

items.title: Skins
items.notes: Skins page is available with current data.

items.title: Game Updates
items.notes: Updates page is implemented and imported.

items.title: Dungeons
items.notes: Dungeon pages are planned but not yet imported.

items.title: Checklist
items.notes: Temporary internal project checklist page.

items.title: Review ST Sets accuracy
items.notes: Validate imported set contents and item links.

items.title: Improve skin descriptions/acquisition parsing
items.notes: Enhance skin detail imports from RealmEye.

items.title: Add Dungeons with drops
items.notes: Import dungeon pages and drop tables.

items.title: Add Boss pages
items.notes: Create boss detail pages with rewards.

items.title: Add search improvements
items.notes: Better item and page search is needed.

items.title: Add public beta notice/polish
items.notes: Add clear messaging for beta testers.
